---
title: "InterCiter — Systems Design"
subtitle: "Combined design document for review"
date: today
format:
  docx:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    highlight-style: github
---

{{< include interciter-systems-design.md >}}

{{< include data-model.md >}}

{{< include architecture.md >}}

{{< include scoring-and-review.md >}}

{{< include evaluation.md >}}

{{< include api.md >}}

{{< include grant-framing.md >}}
